ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee assigned to the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team represents */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" TEXT /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "contract_expiry" TEXT /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which the event occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the event during the game */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event (e.g., shot made, foul) */,
  "score_home" TEXT /* Current score of the home team at the time of the event */,
  "score_away" TEXT /* Current score of the away team at the time of the event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player involved in the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., shot, rebound, turnover) */,
  "shot_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the shot (if applicable) */,
  "shot_angle" TEXT /* Angle of the shot (if applicable) */,
  "rebound_type" TEXT /* Type of rebound (if applicable, e.g., offensive, defensive) */,
  "foul_type" TEXT /* Type of foul (if applicable) */,
  "substitution_type" TEXT /* Type of substitution (if applicable, e.g., in, out) */,
  "timeout_type" TEXT /* Type of timeout (if applicable, e.g., regular, full) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, coach) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the report */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game for which the report is created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Text summary of the game's overview and key events */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reports_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
